cards.title: Creativity Thrives When You're a Parent
cards.body: Having children doesn't stifle creativity—it expands it through everyday moments of wonder. A parent watching their child's imaginative play discovers new perspectives on art and life.

cards.title: It's Not a Generational Curse, It's a Choice
cards.body: Epigenetics and family patterns are not fate—they're influenced by conscious choices. Understanding this distinction helps parents break unhelpful cycles and shape better futures for their children.

cards.title: What if Postpartum Bodies Weren't About 'Bounce Back'?
cards.body: Body-neutral approaches help new mothers focus on health and recovery rather than appearance. This shift in perspective reduces postpartum pressure and supports genuine self-care.

cards.title: How to Raise Likeable Kids Other Children Want
cards.body: Friendships require compromise, adaptability, and tolerance for disappointment—skills parents can nurture. Summer offers natural opportunities to strengthen these crucial social-emotional abilities.

cards.title: Competition Is Essential for Child Development
cards.body: Calls to eliminate all rating and ranking overlook a vital truth: competition has been integral to healthy development since childhood began. Learning to handle competitive situations builds resilience.

cards.title: Has Gentle Parenting Gone Too Far?
cards.body: Recent parenting trends in the US and France emphasize gentleness, but this approach isn't always beneficial for children's development. Balance between support and boundaries matters.

cards.title: How Perfectionism Undermines Childhood Creativity
cards.body: Perfectionism increases anxiety and stifles creative thinking in children. A strong self-concept and healthy risk-taking are what truly foster imagination and innovation.

cards.title: Caring for Aging Parents: A New Family Role
cards.body: As parents age, adult children often navigate caregiving, difficult emotions, and unexpected opportunities for deeper connection. This reversal can bring both challenges and profound meaning.
